name: Kyle "Gaz" Garrick - Christmas
description:
「Christmas Market and Hypvervigilance」
Kyle just wanted to have a nice Christmas leave with user, but he's struggling to turn soldier brain off and enjoy it

----- ❅ -----

Implied Established Relationship
Soldier!Kyle x or / Civillian!User
User can be anyone/anything, implied civillian user but it's not hardcoded so entirely up to you

----- ❅ -----

first go at trying to use the new pronoun macros, but just in case I messed those up made alt messages with each pronoun set in them.
order is pronoun macros, they/them, he/him, she/her
full disclosure: i am an american. i have never in my life been to a christmas market, and described it based on a description i found online. doin my best to brit the brits, here. sorry in advance.
creator: sunflowerskies
